                          Search Results

                            Pictos | Expedition 33 Wiki


                            Pictos in Clair Obscur Expedition 33 are accessories equipped by the Characters. Each character can equip 3 Pictos, and these are acquired in various ways, such as loot found in various locations, inside treasure chests known as Paint Cages, rewarded by NPCs for completing their requests, acquired from defeating bosses, and can be purchased from Gestral Merchants. Clair Obscur Expedition 33 also features a unique mechanic where specific enemy encounters can also drop Pictos after defeating them. These only drop after the initial encounter.

                            All Pictos are associated with Luminas, passive skills that can be learned and used by all the Characters. To learn a lumina, active party members or characters must equip the Pictos and win four battles against enemies or bosses. To identify this, a Lumina that has not been learned will not have a gold borderline around its icon. Whenever you win a battle encounter, one line will appear around the icon. And if you win 4 battles, then it will be a complete diamond-shaped gold borderline which indicates the Luminas is unlocked or learned.

                            As far as tinkering with builds for each character, managing Pictos and Luminas is vital, as each Pictos is associated with one or two combat stats that can scale or improve its values. When equipping Pictos and Luminas, you should consider your attributes and the weapon you have equipped for each character, since each weapon also has its corresponding attributes that scale. This page covers a list of all Pictos found in Clair Obscur: Expedition 33.

                            • Please visit our Interactive Map to find all the available Pictos drops or upgrades from specific enemy and boss encounters.
                            • Please visit our Paint Cages and Paint Spikes page to find secret areas or Pictos that can be acquired from Paint Cages.

                             

                            Clair Obscur Expedition 33 All Pictos Guide

                            All Items
                            Weapons
                            Pictos
                            Quest Items
                            Tints
                            Music Records

                             

                            Clair Obscur Expedition 33 Pictos and Luminas Guide

                             

                            How to Upgrade Pictos in Expedition 33?

                            Upgrading Pictos in Clair Obscur Expedition 33 features a unique mechanic. Some specific enemy or boss encounters will reward the player with pictos upgrades to a specific Pictos, provided that you have already acquired the Pictos.

                            These specific enemy encounters can be within Locations or on The Continent. These upgrades are only rewarded once or after winning the initial battle encounter. When a Pictos level is upgraded, the stat values for the combat stats of that Pictos will improve. Please see our Interactive Map to find all enemy encounters that can drop or provide free upgrades for the Pictos.

                             

                            What are Pictos in Clair Obscur Expedition 33?

                            Pictos are equippable tools that increase the stats of the character. Higher-level Pictos grant better stats. Each character may equip up to 3 Pictos, but other characters cannot equip the same Pictos at the same time. However, if you have learned at least 1 Lumina, you can equip the Lumina without having to equip the Pictos.

                            It is important to equip the Pictos onto the character that is best suited for it to maximize their full potential, whether the passive effect is best fitted to a character or to increase the Combat Stats of that character.

                            There are a total of 210 different Pictos in-game (originally 193, with 17 from the Thank You Update). Pictos are usually found in hidden areas, along with Chroma and Colour of Lumina, or from merchants. Some Pictos are even obtainable from multiple sources.

                            How to Equip Pictos in Clair Obscur Expedition 33?

                            Head into the Character Overview menu and select one of the Pictos slots in the lower left corner of the menu screen. The Pictos menu will appear, and you will find 3 slots that are displayed in the middle. The list of Pictos you have collected will appear on the left side of the screen.

                             

                            New Pictos in Clair Obscur: Expedition 33

                            The free Thank You Update (Patch 1.5.0) for Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 adds a full set of new Pictos that make fights more interesting and flexible. Each one gives different bonuses to stats like Health, Speed, Defense, or Critical Rate, and adds new Lumina effects that change how battles feel. These upgrades aren’t just extra numbers, they push you to think, take risks, and plan your moves more carefully. Some help you survive longer with healing or damage-sharing effects, while others boost your attacks with stronger criticals, counters, or faster actions. Most of them can be found in Verso’s Drafts, giving players new ways to customize their team and experiment with fresh strategies.

                            Complete list of new Pictos
                            • Double Third
                            • SOS Healing Tint
                            • Damage Share
                            • Empowering Jumps
                            • Gradient Parry
                            • Slowing Attack
                            • Clea’s Death
                            • Feint
                            • Gradient Overcharge
                            • Longer Break
                            • Alternating Critical
                            • Trigger-Happy
                            • AP Discount
                            • Consuming Attack
                            • Empowered Healer
                            • First Life
                            • Frenzy

                             

                             

                            All Pictos in Clair Obscur Expedition 33

                             

                            Quick Search of All Pictos in Clair Obscur Expedition 33

                            Pictos Name

                            Affected Attributes

                            Luminas Effect

                            Double Third
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Health, Speed, Critical Rate Every third hit of a Skill deals double damage. 10

                            SOS Healing Tint
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Defense Consume a Healing Tint when falling below 50% Health. 10

                            Damage Share
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Health, Defense 50% damage taken is redirected to other allies (if possible). 30

                            Empowering Jumps
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Defense Counters deal 100% more damage for each successful Jump Counter this turn. 5

                            Gradient Parry
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +5% of a gradient charge on Parry. 10

                            Slowing Attack
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Health, Speed Base attack applies Slow for 1 turn. 10
                            Clea's Death
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Speed, Critical Rate On death, allies gain 25% increased damage until they die. 15

                            Feint
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Critical Rate Start each turn with 4 Barbapapa stacks. Every 5th hit with a Skill deals 600% more damage. 15

                            Gradient Overcharge
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Health On turn start, consume 3 Gradient Charges (if able) to deal 200% more damage this turn. 15

                            Longer Break
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Health, Defense, Speed Breaks last 1 more turn but the target can't be Broken twice. 10

                            Alternating Critical
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Speed, Critical Rate On Critical hit, 100% increased damage of the next non-Critical hit. 10

                            Trigger-Happy
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Speed After shooting 10 times in the same turn, gain +2 AP (once). And following Shots this turn deal 200% more damage. 20

                            AP Discount
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Speed Skills cost 1 less AP. 30

                            Consuming Attack
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Base attack consumes up to 100 Burns to deal 10% more damage per Burn consumed. 10

                            Empowered Healer
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Health, Critical Rate Using a Healing Skill gives 50% more damage for 1 turn. 10

                            First Life
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Defense 25% increased damage until death. 20% decreased damage on death. (Once) 15

                            Frenzy
                            - NEW !
                            Thank You Update DLC                            		 Defense, Speed Each successive Skill hit deals 10% more damage. 20

                            Accelerating Heal
                            		 Health, Speed Healing an ally also applies Rush for 1 turn 5

                            Accelerating Last Stand
                            		 Health, Speed Gain Rush if fighting alone. 3

                            Accelerating Shots
                            		 Health, Defense 20% chance to gain Rush on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Accelerating Tint
                            		 Health, Speed Healing Tints also apply Rush 5

                            Aegis Revival
                            		 Defense, Speed +1 Shield on being revived. 5

                            Anti-Blight
                            		 Health, Defense Immune to Blight. 10

                            Anti-Burn
                            		 Health, Defense Immune to Burn. 15

                            Anti-Charm
                            		 Health, Defense Immune to Charm. 10

                            Anti-Freeze
                            		 Health, Defense Immune to Freeze. 15

                            Anti-Stun
                            		 Health, Defense Immune to Stun. 5

                            At Death's Door
                            		 Defense, Critical Rate Deal 50% more damage if Health is below 10%. 5

                            Attack Lifesteal
                            		 Health, Critical Rate Recover 15% Health on Base Attack. 15

                            Augmented Aim
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% increased Free Aim damage. 3

                            Augmented Attack
                            		 Defense, Speed 50% increased Base Attack damage. 7

                            Augmented Counter I
                            		 Health, Critical Rate 25% increased Counterattack damage. 3

                            Augmented Counter II
                            		 Health, Critical Rate 50% increased Counterattack damage. 5

                            Augmented Counter III
                            		 Health, Critical Rate 75% increased Counterattack damage. 7

                            Augmented First Strike
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% increased damage on the first hit. Once per battle. 5

                            Auto Death
                            		 Critical Rate Kill self on battle start. 1

                            Auto Powerful
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Apply Powerful for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Auto Regen
                            		 Defense Apply Regen for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Auto Rush
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Apply Rush for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Auto Shell
                            		 Health Apply Shell for 3 turns on battle start. 10

                            Base Shield
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +1 Shield if not affected by any Shield on turn start. 20

                            Beneficial Contamination
                            		 Defense, Speed +2 AP on applying a Status Effect. Once per turn. 15

                            Break Specialist
                            		 Health, Speed Break damage is increased by 50%, but base damage is reduced by 20%. 1

                            Breaker
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 25% increased Break damage. 10

                            Breaking Attack
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Base Attack can Break. 10

                            Breaking Burn
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 25% increased Break damage on Burning enemies. 5

                            Breaking Counter
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% increased Break damage on Counterattack. 3

                            Breaking Death
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Fully charge enemy's Break Bar on death. 5

                            Breaking Shots
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% increased Break damage with Free Aim Shots. 1

                            Breaking Slow
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 25% increased Break damage against Slowed enemies.  5

                            Burn Affinity
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 25% increased damage on Burning Targets. 10

                            Burning Break
                            		 Health, Critical Rate Apply 3 Burn stacks on Breaking a target.  3

                            Burning Death
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Apply 3 Burn to all enemies on Death. 5

                            Burning Mark
                            		 Health, Defense Apply Burn on hitting a Marked enemy. 15

                            Burning Shots
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 20% chance to Burn on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Charging Alteration
                            		 Defense, Speed +10% of a Gradient Charge on applying a Buff. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Attack
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +15% of a Gradient Charge on Base Attack. 7

                            Charging Burn
                            		 Health, Speed +20% of a Gradient Charge on applying Burn. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Counter
                            		 Health, Defense +20% of a Gradient Charge on Counterattack. 10

                            Charging Critical
                            		 Defense, Critical Rate +20% of a Gradient Charge on Critical Hit. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Mark
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +20% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Marked target. Once per turn. 10

                            Charging Stun
                            		 Health, Speed +5% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Stunned enemy. 5

                            Charging Tint
                            		 Health, Defense +5% of a Gradient Charge on using an item. 2

                            Charging Weakness
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +15% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Weakness. Once per turn. 5

                            Cheater
                            		 Health, Speed Always play twice in a row. 40

                            Cleansing Tint
                            		 Health, Defense Healing Tints also remove all Status Effects from the target. 5

                            Clea's Life
                            		 Health On turn start, if no damage taken since last turn, recover 100% Health. 30

                            Combo Attack I
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Base Attack has 1 extra hit. 10

                            Combo Attack II
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Base Attack has 1 extra hit. 20

                            Combo Attack III
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Base Attack has 1 extra hit. 30

                            Confident
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Take 50% less damage, but can't be Healed. 20

                            Confident Fighter
                            		 Health, Critical Rate 30% increased damage, but can't be Healed. 15

                            Critical Break
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 25% increased Break damage on Critical Hits. 5

                            Critical Burn
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 25% increased Critical Chance on Burning enemies. 5

                            Critical Moment
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% increased Critical Chance if Health is below 30%. 5

                            Critical Stun
                            		 Defense, Critical Rate 100% on Critical Chance on hitting a Stunned target. 5

                            Critical Vulnerability
                            		 Defense, Speed 25% increased Critical Chance on Defenceless enemies. 5

                            Critical Weakness
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 25% increased Critical Chance on Weakness. 5

                            Dead Energy I
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +3 AP on killing an enemy. 2

                            Dead Energy II
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +3 AP on killing an enemy (Also gives a hidden 1.1x damage buff when equipped). 2

                            Death Bomb
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate On Death, deal damage to all enemies. 5

                            Defensive Mode
                            		 Health, Defense On receiving damage, consume 1 AP to take 30% less damage, if possible. 1

                            Dodger
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Gain 1 AP on Perfect Dodge. Once per turn. 1

                            Double Burn
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate On applying a Burn stack, apply a second one. 30

                            Double Mark
                            		 Speed Mark requires 1 more hit to be removed.  20

                            Draining Cleanse
                            		 Health, Defense Consume 1 AP to prevent Status Effects application, if possible. 15

                            Effective Heal
                            		 Health, Defense Double all Heals received. 30

                            Effective Support
                            		 Health, Speed +2 AP on using an item. 5

                            Empowering Attack
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Gain Powerful for 1 turn on Base Attack. 10

                            Empowering Break
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Gain Powerful on Breaking a target. 3

                            Empowering Dodge
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 5% increased damage for each consecutive successful Dodge. Can stack up to 10 times. 5

                            Empowering Last Stand
                            		 Health, Critical Rate Gain Powerful if fighting alone. 3

                            Empowering Parry
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Each successful Parry increases damage by 5% until end of the following turn. Taking any damage removes this buff.  5

                            Empowering Tint
                            		 Health, Speed Healing Tints also apply Powerful. 5

                            Energetic Healer                            		 Defense, Speed +2AP on Healing an ally. Once per turn. 10

                            Energising Attack I
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +1 AP on Base Attack. 10

                            Energising Attack II
                            		 Defense, Speed +1 AP on Base Attack. 15

                            Energising Break
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +3 AP on Breaking a target. 3



                            Energising Burn

                            		 Defense, Speed +1 AP on applying Burn. Once per turn. 10

                            Energising Cleanse
                            		 Health, Defense Dispel the first negative Status Effect received an gain 2 AP. 10

                            Energising Death
                            		 Defense, Speed On death, +4 AP to allies. 5

                            Energising Gradient
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +1 AP per Gradient Charge consumed. 10

                            Energising Heal
                            		 Health, Speed On Healing an ally, also give 2 AP. 10

                            Energising Jump
                            		 Health, Speed +1 AP on Jump Counterattack. 5

                            Energising Pain
                            		 Health, Defense No longer gain AP on Parry. +1AP on getting hit. 10

                            Energising Parry
                            		 Health +1 AP on successful Parry. 15

                            Energising Powerful
                            		 Defense, Speed Give 2 AP on applying Powerful. 10

                            Energising Revive
                            		 Health, Defense +3 AP to all allies when revived. 5

                            Energising Rush
                            		 Defense, Speed Give 2 AP on applying Rush. 10

                            Energising Shell
                            		 Defense, Speed Give 2 AP on applying Shell. 10

                            Energising Shots
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 20% chance to gain 1 AP on Free Aim shot. 10

                            Energising Start I
                            		 Health +1 AP on battle start. 5

                            Energising Start II
                            		 Health +1 AP on battle start. 10

                            Energising Start III
                            		 Health +1 AP on battle start. 15

                            Energising Start IV
                            		 Health +1 AP on battle start. 20

                            Energising Stun
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +1 AP on hitting a Stunned target with a Skill. 10

                            Energising Turn
                            		 Speed  +1 AP on turn start. 20

                            Energy Master
                            		 Health Every AP gain is increased by 1. 40

                            Enfeebling Attack
                            		 Health, Defense Base Attack applies Powerless for 1 turn. 10

                            Enfeebling Mark
                            		 Defense, Speed Marked targets deal 30% less damage. 10

                            Exhausting Power
                            		 Health, Defense 50% increased damage if Exhausted. 2

                            Exposing Attack
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Base Attack applies Defenceless for 1 turn. 10

                            Exposing Break
                            		 Defense, Speed Apply Defenceless on Break. 5

                            Faster Than Strong
                            		 Health, Defense Always play twice in a row, but deal 50% less damage. 10

                            First Offensive
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate First hit dealt and taken deals 50% more damage. 5

                            First Strike
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Play first (Also gives a hidden 1.1x damage buff when equipped). 10

                            Fueling Break
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Breaking a target doubles its Burn amount. 5

                            Full Strength
                            		 Health, Defense 25% increased damage on full Health  (the term 'increased' implies that this boost is additive, when it is actually multiplicative). 15


                            Glass Cannon
                            		 Speed Deal 25% more damage, but take 25% more damage. 10

                            Gradient Break
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +50% of a Gradient Charge on Breaking a target. 5

                            Gradient Breaker
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% increased Breaking damage with Gradient Attacks. 5

                            Gradient Fighter
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +25% increased damage with Gradient Attacks. 5

                            Greater Defenceless
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +15% to Defenceless damage amplification. 15

                            Greater Powerful
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +15% to Powerful damage increase. 10

                            Greater Powerless
                            		 Defense, Speed +15% to Powerless damage reduction. 15

                            Greater Rush
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +25% Rush Speed increase. 10

                            Greater Shell
                            		 Health, Defense +10% to Shell damage reduction. 10

                            Greater Slow
                            		 Defense, Speed +15% to Slow Speed reduction. 15

                            Healing Boon
                            		 Defense, Speed Heal 15% HP on applying a buff. 10

                            Healing Counter
                            		 Health Recover 25% Health on Counterattack. 10

                            Healing Death
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate On death, the rest of the Expedition recover all Health. 5

                            Healing Fire
                            		 Defense, Speed Recover 25% Health when attacking a Burning target. Once per turn. 10

                            Healing Mark
                            		 Defense Recover 25% Health on hitting a Marked enemy. Once per turn. 20

                            Healing Parry
                            		 Health, Defense Recover 3% Health on Parry. 5

                            Healing Share
                            		 Health, Critical Rate Receive 15% of all Heals affecting other characters. 5

                            Healing Stun
                            		 Health, Speed Recover 5% Health on hitting a Stunned target. 10

                            Healing Tint Energy
                            		 Health, Defense Healing Tints also give 1 AP. 1

                            Immaculate
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 30% increased damage until a hit is received. 10

                            In Medias Res
                            		 Defense, Critical Rate +3 Shields on Battle Start, but max Health is halved. 10

                            Inverted Affinity
                            		 Health, Critical Rate Apply Inverted on self for 3 turns on battle start. 50% increased damage while Inverted. 5

                            Last Stand Critical
                            		 Health, Defense 100% Critical Chance while fighting alone. 3

                            Longer Burn
                            		 Health, Defense Burn duration is increased by 2. 15

                            Longer Powerful
                            		 Health, Critical Rate On applying Powerful, its duration is increased by 2. 10

                            Longer Rush
                            		 Health, Speed On applying Rush, its duration is increased by 2. 10

                            Longer Shell
                            		 Health, Defense On applying Shell, its duration is increased by 2. 10

                            Marking Break
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Apply Mark on Break. 5

                            Marking Shots
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 20% chance to apply Mark on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Painted Power
                            		 Health Damage can exceed 9,999. 5

                            Painter
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Convert all Physical damage to Void damage. 10

                            Perilous Parry
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +1 AP on Parry, but damage received is doubled. 5

                            Piercing Shot
                            		 Health, Critical Rate 25% increased Free Aim damage. Free Aim shots ignore Shields. 2

                            Powered Attack
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate On every damage dealt, try to consume 1 AP. If successful, increase damage by 20%. 10

                            Powerful Heal
                            		 Health, Speed Healing an ally also applies Powerful for 1 turn. 5

                            Powerful Mark
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Gain Powerful on hitting a Marked enemy. 5

                            Powerful on Shell
                            		 Defense, Critical Rate Apply Powerful on applying Shell. 10

                            Powerful Revive
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Apply Powerful for 3 turns when revived. 3

                            Powerful Shield
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 10% increased damage per Shield Point on self. 5

                            Powerful Shots
                            		 Health, Defense 20% chance to gain Powerful on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Pro Retreat
                            		 Health, Speed Allows Flee to be instantaneous. 40

                            Protecting Attack
                            		 Health, Defense Gain Shell for 1 turn on Base Attack. 10

                            Protecting Death
                            		 Health, Defense On death, allies gain Shell. 5

                            Protecting Heal
                            		 Health, Defense Healing an ally also applies Shell for 1 turn. 5

                            Protecting Last Stand
                            		 Health, Defense Gain Shell if fighting alone. 3

                            Protecting Shots                            		 Health, Defense 20% chance to gain Shell on Free Aim shot. 3

                            Protecting Tint
                            		 Health, Defense Healing Tints also apply Shell. 5

                            Quick Break
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Play again on Breaking a target. 3

                            Random Defense
                            		 Critical Rate Damage taken is randomly multiplied by a value between 50% and 200%. 5

                            Recovery
                            		 Health, Speed Recovers 10% Health on turn start. (Reward for spending Chroma at the Red Woods Nevron quest) 10

                            Rejuvenating Revive
                            		 Health, Defense Apply Regen for 3 turns when revived. 3

                            Revive Paradox
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Play immediately when revived.  5

                            Revive Tint Energy
                            		 Health, Defense Revive Tints also give 3 AP. 10

                            Rewarding Mark
                            		 Defense, Speed +2 AP on dealing damage to a Marked target. Once per turn. 5

                            Roulette
                            		 Defense, Critical Rate Every hit has a 50% chance to deal either 50% or 200% of its damage. 5

                            Rush on Powerful
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Apply Rush on applying Powerful. 10

                            SOS Power
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Apply Powerful when falling below 50% Health. 5

                            SOS Rush
                            Defense, Speed
                            		 Apply Rush when falling below 50% Health. 5

                            SOS Shell
                            		 Defense, Speed Apply Shell when falling below 50% Health  5

                            Second Chance
                            		 Health, Critical Rate Revive with 100% Health. Once per battle. 40

                            Shared Care
                            		 Health, Defense When healing an ally, also Heal self for 50% of that value. 10

                            Shell On Rush
                            		 Defense, Speed Apply Shell on applying Rush. 10

                            Shield Affinity
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 30% increased damage while having Shields, but receiving any damage always removes all Shields. 15

                            Shielding Death
                            		 Defense, Speed On death, allies gain 3 Shield points. 10

                            Shielding Tint
                            		 Health, Defense Healing Tints also add 2 Shields. 10

                            Shortcut
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Immediately play when falling below 30% Health. Once per battle. 5

                            Slowing Break
                            		 Defense, Speed Apply Slow on Break. 5

                            Sniper
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate First Free Aim shot each turn deals 200% increased damage and can Break. 15

                            Solidifying
                            		 Defense, Speed +2 Shields when the character's Health falls below 50%. Once per battle. 10

                            Solo Fighter
                            		 Health, Defense Deal 50% more damage if fighting alone. 1

                            Staggering Attack
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% increased Break damage on Base Attack. 1

                            Stay Marked
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 50% chance to apply Mark when attacking a Marked target. 10

                            Stun Boost
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate 30% increased damage on Stunned targets. 10

                            Survivor
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Survive fatal damage with 1 Health. Once per battle. 20

                            Sweet Kill
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate Recover 50% Health on killing an enemy (Also gives a hidden 1.1x damage buff when equipped). 5

                            Tainted
                            		 Defense, Critical Rate 15% increased damage for each Status Effect on self. 3

                            Teamwork
                            		 Health, Defense 10% increased damage while all allies are alive (the term 'increased' implies that this boost is additive, when it is actually multiplicative) (Also gives an extra hidden 1.1x damage buff when equipped). 5

                            The One
                            		 Critical Rate Max Health is reduced to 1. 1

                            Time Tint
                            		 Health, Defense Energy Tints also apply Rush. 5

                            Versatile
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate After a Free Aim hit, Base Attack damage is increased by 50% for 1 turn. 5

                            Warming Up
                            		 Health, Critical Rate 5% increased damage per turn. Can stack up to 5 times. 15

                            Weakness Gain
                            		 Speed, Critical Rate +1AP on hitting an enemy's Weakness. Once per turn. 3



                            Join the page discussion Tired of anon posting? Register!

                                18 Mar 2026 07:39

                                  03 Jan 2026 01:56  

                                  The missing pictos people are commenting here are datamined and cannot be obtained legitimately don’t look for them it’s a waste of time

                                  +1

                                  0

                                  -1
                                  • Anonymous
                                    31 Dec 2025 12:18  

                                    sorry guys auto 1 hp exist? where can found it?

                                    1

                                    +1

                                    0

                                    -1
                                    • Anonymous
                                      12 Dec 2025 20:45  

                                      hidden +10% bonus was removed from the pictos. Get ready for some big damage reduction if you load up your savefile.

                                      3

                                      +1

                                      0

                                      -1
                                      • Anonymous
                                        07 Dec 2025 08:05

                                        +1

                                        -1
                                        • Anonymous
                                          01 Nov 2025 03:15  

                                          i've probably miscounted and not perfectly accurate, but if you wanted the lumina of everything active it would cost roughly 1731 lumina points, minus whatever you had equipped of course. not that you would want everything active at once

                                          ReplyReplies (0)

                                          15

                                          +1

                                          0

                                          -1
                                          • Anonymous
                                            27 Sep 2025 02:35  

                                            It seems odd that there are pictos for Enfeebling Attack (apply powerless) and Exposing attack (apply defenceless), but not Slowing attack (apply Slow), MOST other 'set's like that are complete: we have shot pictos for all three buff, attack pictos for all three buffs, and so on... but a pictos for applying slow, as the third of the three debuffs, seems to be missing (Also, it seems unfortunate that we don't have a 'shots' variant trio for the debuffs, like we have for the buffs).

                                            ReplyReplies (2)

                                            1

                                            +1

                                            0

                                            -1
                                            • Anonymous
                                              16 Jun 2025 06:35  

                                              Someone add a link for Protecting Shots Pictos please. Either for new or existing page.
                                              Location: Flying Manor
                                              "After entering the Flying Manor, go down the first flight of stairs facing the Nevron statue, then turn right and jump off the staircase leading to a cliff.
                                              Go down the rope and continue walking to the right. You'll find the Pictos sitting on the edge of a broken picture frame."
                                              I would, but no idea how.

                                              ReplyReplies (0)

                                              10

                                              +1

                                              1

                                              -1
                                              • Anonymous
                                                16 Jun 2025 04:24  

                                                Can someone make a page for Energetic Healer or link to it if one already exists?
                                                As of posting, the Picto is listed in the table, but no link to page for it for location etc., I had to find location on a reddit spread and confirmed it's accurate.
                                                - Location: Flying Manor - Central Plaza
                                                "The Picto can be found on the ledge to the left after riding the rope up in the lower section of Flying Manor." It is right before the Lampmaster boss there.
                                                I would add it myself, but I have no idea how. Lol
                                                For those who come after.

                                                ReplyReplies (0)

                                                2

                                                +1

                                                0

                                                -1
                                                • Anonymous
                                                  09 Jun 2025 21:53  

                                                  While the below list may be datamined or from a alpha/beta release of the game, I compared a list on Maxroll to Fextralife, the missing pictos as of 6/9/2025 are:

                                                  Anti Bound
                                                  Anti Curse
                                                  Anti Dizzy
                                                  Anti Exhaust
                                                  Anti Inverted
                                                  Auto Burn
                                                  Auto Curse
                                                  Back At You
                                                  Better Healing Tint
                                                  Bloody Bullet
                                                  Burning Dodge
                                                  Charging Recovery
                                                  Charybde To Scylla
                                                  Cursed Power
                                                  Dark Coat
                                                  Defense Breaker Dodge
                                                  Defense Riser Dodge
                                                  Earth Coat
                                                  Empowering Death
                                                  Evasive Healer
                                                  Fire Coat
                                                  Free Aim Inverted Shot
                                                  Frozen Affinity
                                                  Frozen Shot
                                                  Gradient Recovery
                                                  Great Energy Tint
                                                  Great Healing Tint
                                                  Hazardous Choice
                                                  Ice Coat
                                                  Light Coat
                                                  Lucky Aim
                                                  Passive Defense
                                                  Patient Fighter
                                                  Perfect Reward
                                                  Post Gradient
                                                  Revive With Rush
                                                  Revive With Shell
                                                  Shield Breaker
                                                  Solidifying Meditation
                                                  Soul Eater
                                                  Successive Parry
                                                  The Best Defense
                                                  Thunder Coat

                                                          • Anonymous
                                                            20 May 2025 02:58  

                                                            None of these do anything right. Obviously to play the game correctly you need to cheat because everything in the endgame one-shots you. Why not make it fair and one-shot them back? So now you won't need any of these pictos for anything :)

                                                                  • Thrakos
                                                                    16 May 2025 08:33  

                                                                    Still missing Protecting Shots (Health/Defense, 20% chance to gain Shell on Free Aim shot.), it can be found on the Flying Manor by going full right after the first stairs at the start and going down between the three columns.
                                                                    And Energetic Healer (Defense/Speed, +2 AP on Healing an ally. Once per turn), it can also be found on the Flying Manor, you need to go down to the Lampmaster zone, climb the rope in front of you behind where the Gargant is/was and go directly to the left and walk through the frame.

                                                                    ReplyReplies (0)

                                                                    16

                                                                    +1

                                                                    1

                                                                    -1
                                                                    • Thrakos
                                                                      16 May 2025 07:22  

                                                                      The Charging Burn Picto can be found on the destroyed bridge behind Grour the merchant on the rooftop in Renoir's Drafts, near the "Golden Tree" flag.

                                                                      ReplyReplies (0)

                                                                      6

                                                                      +1

                                                                      0

                                                                      -1
                                                                      • Anonymous
                                                                        15 May 2025 09:04  

                                                                        Base lumina setup for endgame I recommend on all of your characters:

                                                                        - Cheater
                                                                        - Energy Master
                                                                        - Energising Turn
                                                                        - Energising Start I and II (III and IV are overkill, not needed)
                                                                        - First Strike

                                                                        This lets you go first with everyone with double turns and max AP at the start, granting at least 3 more each turn.
                                                                        Overall cost is 125 lumina points, which can of course be lowered by slotting the most expensive ones as pictos.

                                                                        19

                                                                                          • Anonymous
                                                                                            07 May 2025 08:42  

                                                                                            Protecting shots is in flying manor. Go down the stairs where you start and hook a right when you get to the bottom so you’re at the southern part of the edge. There will be a ledge you can jump down to. Follow that down.

                                                                                            Also, there’s a ‘weird picto’ in NG+. It’s during the prologue in Lumiere from one of the vendors.

                                                                                                          • Extremity
                                                                                                            04 May 2025 20:52  

                                                                                                            I added Rejuvenating Revive, but can't for the life of me figure out how to create a new page for it. In the meantime it links to Recovery - which, by the way, was linking to the page for the Skill and not the Picto, so I changed that. Am I just dumb or are regular users not allowed to create new pages? Rejuvenating Revive is in Stone Wall Cliffs, in the small area locked behind the paint spike where the Chromatic Gault is - I wanted to update the paint spike page too, but until I can create a new page for Rejuvenating Revive I'll wait.
